findings.title: CISA Adds 8 Exploited Flaws to KEV — Quest KACE CVSS 10.0, PaperCut, TeamCity, Cisco SD-WAN
findings.affected_technology: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance, PaperCut NG/MF, JetBrains TeamCity, Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, Kentico CMS, Zimbra
findings.summary: CISA added 8 actively exploited vulnerabilities to the KEV catalog with federal patch deadlines, headlined by Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (CVSS 10.0) and a new Cisco SD-WAN Manager info disclosure flaw distinct from previously reported CVE-2026-20127.

findings.title: Progress MOVEit WAF and LoadMaster — RCE, OS Command Injection, and WAF Detection Bypass
findings.summary: Progress Software patched critical vulnerabilities in MOVEit WAF and LoadMaster enabling remote code execution, OS command injection, and WAF detection bypass in widely deployed enterprise infrastructure.

findings.title: Firefox 150 / ESR 140.10 Patches 34+ Vulnerabilities Including Critical DOM Security Bypass (CVE-2026-6771, CVSS 9.8)
findings.summary: Mozilla released Firefox 150 and ESR 140.10 fixing 34+ vulnerabilities including a critical CVSS 9.8 DOM security mitigation bypass and nine high-severity use-after-free and memory corruption flaws.

findings.title: Apache ActiveMQ CVE-2026-34197 — 6,400 Exposed Servers Quantified, Exploitation Scope Confirmed
findings.summary: Shadowserver confirmed 6,400+ exposed ActiveMQ servers across Asia, North America, and Europe with active exploitation ongoing, and Horizon3 published detection guidance for the 13-year-old code injection flaw.

findings.title: Terrarium CVE-2026-5752 — AI Code Sandbox Escape to Root via JavaScript Prototype Chain (Vendor Unresponsive)
findings.summary: CERT/CC disclosed a sandbox escape in Cohere's Terrarium platform allowing arbitrary command execution as root via JavaScript prototype chain traversal in the Pyodide WebAssembly environment, with vendor coordination failed.

noted.summary: Previously undocumented wiper malware targeting Venezuelan energy and utility organizations; Kaspersky analysis published April 21; geopolitically motivated, no general enterprise remote vector.
Reflected XSS in login ReturnTo parameter on Alteon load balancers; patch expected in v34.5.7.0 but unclear if shipped.
GraphQL mutation input fields passed to shell exec() enabling OS command injection (CVSS 7.2); requires authentication.
Git revision parameter argument injection enables arbitrary binary execution in CI/CD pipelines using Tekton trusted resources (CVSS 7.5).
Over 1,500 unsecured Perforce instances discovered allowing file reads from major organizations; misconfiguration issue, not a vulnerability.
1,570+ victims tracked via compromised C2 panel; RC4-encrypted SOCKS5 tunneling with 320+ claimed victims since July 2025; ransomware operations intelligence.
